signals.headline: ETH ETF Inflows Cross $275M in Strongest Week Since January, Driving Price to $2,288 Amid Institutional Demand** | YES |
signals.raw:
ETH ETF Inflows Cross $275M in Strongest Week Since January, Driving Price to $2,288 Amid Institutional Demand** | YES | HIGH  
Ethereum ETFs recorded over $275 million in weekly inflows—the highest since January 2026—with Fidelity’s FETH and BlackRock’s ETHA leading, coinciding with a 7% ETH price rise to near $2,400 before settling at $2,288.[1] This marks confirmed strong institutional return,

signals.headline: US-Iran ceasefire extended (April 22, 2026)** | YES | HIGH confidence[3]
signals.raw:
US-Iran ceasefire extended (April 22, 2026)** | YES | HIGH confidence[3]

Goldman Sachs' U.S. Inflation Monitor (released April 20) highlights core PCE inflation decelerating toward 2.2% (excluding tariffs), with oil prices expected to fall to $80/barrel by Q4 2026 despite upside risks from the Iran war; this ceasefire extension reduces those geopolitical risks, potentially accelerating the foreca
